guardrail: static projection of the public register; no facts added here

data.name: KR -> US (KRW->USD directed edge)
data.feasibility_class: Category III (no direct issuance; partnership / coordination route)

infrastructure_overlap.note: Both ends on Project Agora (KR and US).

inbound_mechanism.test: GENIUS Act regime enacted 2025-07-18, §18 inbound gate not yet operative (§20); inbound gate not reached because the origin has no exportable authorizable token (Category III via origin drag)

class_basis.instrument: Virtual Asset User Protection Act (in force 2024-07-19) is a user-protection and market-abuse statute, not an issuance-licensing framework; domestic won-stablecoin issuance is effectively prohibited. The Digital Asset Basic Act remains an un-enacted bill (National Assembly Political Affairs Committee subcommittee).

record_ref_meta.note: Vocabulary divergence: the register codes the draft Digital Asset Basic Act as `pending_proposal` (there IS a bill); the signal codes the absence of an operative issuance regime as `no_regime` (there is nothing in force to authorize under). Same instruments, different question asked of them.
record_ref_meta.divergence: Vocabulary divergence: the register codes the draft Digital Asset Basic Act as `pending_proposal` (there IS a bill); the signal codes the absence of an operative issuance regime as `no_regime` (there is nothing in force to authorize under). Same instruments, different question asked of them.

origin_override.basis: Korean foreign-exchange controls; Atlas v0.2.5 carries '[conditional origin-egress override (Korea FX, dormant)]' on all 11 KR-> rows -- conditional and dormant because there is no exportable won token for them to bite on.
